title: Handshake
brief: Acquire secondary control of the HSA capability and hold it.
teaches: The control-acquisition handshake: wait for the capability to advertise AVAILABLE, then ACQUIRE. FA silently ignores flight commands until you are the secondary controller (VI Vol §1.2.2.2).

objective._doc: No flight. Win = MA is the secondary controller of CAP-HSA for 30 consecutive ticks (hold-control).
